notes: Per-category operational config. 'effort' is author-configured (never derived from reviews) and is the fixed default effort to address that category. 'severity_weight' scales the severity formula. 'severity_multiplier' applies an extra multiplier to safety/pest/maintenance/billing concerns. severity_settings and recency define the deterministic scoring.

recency.notes: Recency-adjusted severity uses explicit date windows anchored to the most recent review date (not today). A negative mention's weight is the window its review falls in. No decay function is used.

suggested_actions.maintenance: Review the maintenance response workflow and communicate expected service timelines to residents.
suggested_actions.leasing_movein: Audit the move-in checklist so units are ready and the leasing handoff is smooth.
suggested_actions.staff_service: Review front-office service standards and follow up on specific resident interactions.
suggested_actions.cleanliness: Increase common-area cleaning frequency and inspect trash areas.
suggested_actions.noise: Review noise policy enforcement and quiet-hours communication.
suggested_actions.parking: Reassess parking allocation and communicate the parking policy clearly.
suggested_actions.safety: Review lighting, access control, and security patrol coverage, and communicate steps taken.
suggested_actions.amenities: Audit amenity uptime and post clear hours and maintenance status.
suggested_actions.rent_fees: Review fee transparency and ensure charges are clearly explained before signing.
suggested_actions.communication: Set response-time standards for resident inquiries and confirm receipt of requests.
suggested_actions.pest: Escalate pest-control cadence and schedule preventive treatments across affected units.
suggested_actions.grounds: Increase landscaping and common-area upkeep frequency.
suggested_actions.neighbor_behavior: Reinforce community guidelines and provide a clear path to report issues.
suggested_actions.package_delivery: Review package handling and secure-locker capacity to reduce lost packages.
suggested_actions.appliances: Plan appliance inspection and replacement for units with recurring failures.
suggested_actions.billing: Audit the billing process to eliminate incorrect charges and clarify statements.
